# DIU and U.S. Navy select Anduril for XL-AUV program

The Defense Innovation Unit and U.S. Navy have selected Anduril for the Combat Autonomous Maritime Platform Project, advancing extra-large autonomous underwater vehicle capabilities with the Dive-XL system.
